endpoints.response_shape: HTML page describing parking zones (white zone with disc max 6h, city-center metered parking) and one named parkplatz (Dreispitz). A linked PDF ("Übersicht Parkplätze in Bülach") contains the detailed facility list.
endpoints.notes: No live availability endpoint. No machine-readable feed. Page text describes parking rules and zones; detailed facility data is in a downloadable PDF, not exposed as data. Listed for discoverability.

parkings.name: Parkplatz Dreispitz
parkings.notes: Only parking facility named verbatim on the page; exempt from the 2h time limit for parking-card holders.
